summary: Iteration 5 Testing Complete - All 10 features verified. Backend: 12/12 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features verified via Playwright.

issues: Route shows empty/blank page instead of proper 404. Minor UX issue - could add catch-all route for unknown paths

passed_tests: Homepage hero image displays with object-contain (full image visible, no cropping on any viewport)
Mobile hero shows letterboxing (dark bars) above/below 16:9 image - expected behavior
PUT /api/settings/hero with navbar_transparent: false persists correctly
PUT /api/settings/hero with navbar_transparent: true persists correctly
When navbar_transparent=true: navbar is transparent at top of page, solid on scroll
When navbar_transparent=false: navbar is always solid (bg-white) even at top of page
Admin Hero Settings page shows 'Navbar Settings' section with toggle switch
/corporate/overview route shows empty page (correctly removed from routes)
Corporate Overview menu item NOT in navigation (correctly removed)
Admin login works with admin@gys.co.id / admin123
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing admin account.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 5 features verified: 1) navbar_transparent toggle in Hero Settings CMS controls navbar transparency behavior, 2) Hero images use object-contain for full display without cropping, 3) CorporateOverview page and menu item removed. Backend test file: /app/backend/tests/test_navbar_transparency.py covers all navbar_transparent API tests.
